passages.title: DARPA MATHBAC Proposal Spine
passages.excerpt: SCBE is submitting to DARPA-SN-26-59 (MATHBAC). Full proposal due 2026-06-16. TA1 track locked: strictly inside, with cost, scope, and deliverables bounded. Lead thesis: geometric upper bound verified under seal. Joint partnership with Collin Walter / DAVA active.

passages.title: Harmonic Wall Formula
passages.excerpt: The canonical harmonic wall is H_wall(d*, R) = R^((phi * d*)^2). At d*=1 the cost multiplier is 13.7x. At d*=2 it is 35,341x. At d*=3 it is 1.6 * 10^9. Adversarial drift is super-exponentially costly, which is why attacks become computationally infeasible rather than just expensive.

passages.title: The 14-Layer SCBE Security Pipeline
passages.excerpt: SCBE runs input through fourteen layers: L1-2 complex context and realification, L3-4 weighted transform and Poincare embedding, L5 hyperbolic distance, L6-7 breathing transform and Mobius phase, L8 multi-well Hamiltonian CFI, L9-10 spectral and spin coherence, L11 triadic temporal distance, L12 harmonic wall, L13 risk decision (ALLOW/QUARANTINE/ESCALATE/DENY), L14 audio-axis telemetry.

passages.title: The Six Sacred Tongues
passages.excerpt: Six sacred tongues weight meaning on a golden-ratio ladder: Kor'aelin (KO) 1.00, Avali (AV) 1.62, Runethic (RU) 2.62, Cassivadan (CA) 4.24, Umbroth (UM) 6.85, Draumric (DR) 11.09. Each tongue is a 16x16 token grid, 256 tokens per language. The spread is phi-scaled so weighted distance behaves like a true metric.

passages.title: 47D Complex Manifold
passages.excerpt: The operating space is 47-dimensional: 6 real tongues, plus C(6,2)=15 pair interactions, plus C(6,3)=20 triple interactions, plus 6 self-imaginary axes. 6+15+20+6=47. The count matches the 47 realities of the Spiralverse lore. The dimension count is combinatorially inevitable given the 6-tongue base, not designed.

passages.title: Toroidal Polyhedral Confinement
passages.excerpt: Toroidal Polyhedral Confinement replaces discrete SHA-style hashing with a continuous geometric lock: phi-winding around a torus intersected with 5 Platonic solid constraints. It is MitM-immune because intermediate states are not valid positions on the surface. Proven 2026-04-04.

passages.title: Phi Toroidal Resonant Cavity
passages.excerpt: Six phi-scaled walls in orthogonal planes form a self-reinforcing toroidal wave-interference cavity. Combined attacker cost scales as R^(122.99 * d*^2) from geometry alone, before any cryptographic primitive is added. The cavity turns layout into key material.

passages.title: Brick3 Sacred-Tongues Drill Complete
passages.excerpt: Brick3 drill_langues_full ran 500 steps warm-started from brick2. Eval loss 0.3965, token accuracy 93.16%, plateau at step 350. Pure local run; TRL 0.28 API churn pinned in requirements.brick.txt. Proves the Sacred-Tongues signal trains into the model without regression.

passages.title: Drill v5 Langues Full
passages.excerpt: Drill v5 holds 2630 rows, 91.8% structural, 0 failures. Foreground-ready. A QA invariance lane was added with 150 rows at 100%. SFT exports live at training-data/sft/drill_langues_full_{all,train,holdout}.sft.jsonl.

passages.title: The Six Tongues Protocol (Book)
passages.excerpt: The Six Tongues Protocol is a published KDP ebook and paperback (ASIN B0GSSFQD9G). The 150K-word isekai novel is timestamped prior art for the Langues/Sacred Tongues system: in-world, the magic IS the protocol architecture.

passages.title: AetherBrowser Rebuild
passages.excerpt: AetherBrowser is an AI-native browser with curated self-hosted training sites, multiple entry points, and cross-threshold governance. Rebuild is scheduled for the weekend after SAM.gov registration settled.

passages.title: SAM.gov Registration Active
passages.excerpt: SAM.gov registration is ACTIVE as of 2026-04-13. UEI J4NXHM6N5F59, CAGE 1EXD5. Sole proprietor, minority-owned Black American. SAM API operational for contract ingest. Satisfies DIBBS/DLA prerequisite.

passages.title: DIBBS / DLA Contracting
passages.excerpt: DIBBS is the DLA Internet Bid Board System (dibbs.bsm.mil) used for federal supply contracting. SCBE applied 2026-04-21 using active SAM.gov registration. Collin's contract channel for defense-adjacent lanes.

passages.title: Quantum Axiom Mesh (A1-A5)
passages.excerpt: Five axioms span the 14 layers: A1 Unitarity (L2, L4, L7 norm preservation), A2 Locality (L3, L8 spatial bounds), A3 Causality (L6, L11, L13 time-ordering), A4 Symmetry (L5, L9, L10, L12 gauge invariance), A5 Composition (L1, L14 pipeline integrity).

passages.title: L13 Risk Decision Tiers
passages.excerpt: Layer 13 maps the harmonic wall score to one of four tiers: ALLOW (safe operation), QUARANTINE (suspicious, needs review), ESCALATE (high risk, requires governance), DENY (adversarial, blocked). Swarm consensus + BFT makes the decision survivable under individual-agent compromise.

passages.title: Dual Revenue Model
passages.excerpt: SCBE sells on two surfaces simultaneously: (1) governed models (subscription) where the customer uses a pre-trained model whose safety is provable, and (2) the governance layer itself (SaaS/API) that wraps the customer's own model. Two distinct products, not one.

passages.title: M5 Mesh Foundry (Sellable)
passages.excerpt: M5 Mesh Foundry is the current sellable product: governance-aware data ingestion and intelligence ops. Three offers: Launch Pack (implementation + first governed dataset), Monthly Ops (managed ingestion), Enterprise License (dedicated deployment, optional blockchain notarization).

passages.title: M6 GeoSeed / SphereMesh (R&D)
passages.excerpt: M6 SphereMesh is a 6-seed, 6-tongue multi-nodal geometric model on the 14-layer stack. Seeds KO/AV/RU/CA/UM/DR. 14-layer dressing and governance stamps. Sacred Eggs as a controlled mutation/genesis gate. 21D canonical state lift for decision consistency.

passages.title: HYDRA Orchestration
passages.excerpt: HYDRA is the central orchestrator: Spine routes work, Heads specialize, Limbs execute, Ledger records, BFT consensus makes decisions under partial compromise. 40+ Python modules coordinate the fleet of agents across the stack.

passages.title: Juggling Scheduler
passages.excerpt: The Juggling Scheduler models task coordination as physical juggling: balls=TaskCapsules, hands=AgentSlots, throws=handoffs, arcs=deadline windows, drops=failures. Seven rules govern safe handoff, including never throwing to an unready hand and catching at the ledger, not at the throw.

passages.title: Red/Blue Arena
passages.excerpt: The Red/Blue Arena runs model-vs-model adversarial simulations against the SCBE governance pipeline. Red team strategies include mimicry, edge-walking, origin-camping, oscillation, and midpoint attacks. Provider-agnostic: local, Anthropic, HuggingFace, OpenAI, xAI.

passages.title: Sacred Eggs: Controlled Genesis
passages.excerpt: Sacred Eggs are ontological anchors, treated as living credentials rather than static tokens. Mother Avion serves as flock governor with phoenix rotation and clutch limits. Hatch=birth, tongue=native language, ritual=school type, credits=grades, PE=shell integrity.

passages.title: Fun Energy Training Gate
passages.excerpt: Fun Energy F = V / (C - R) gates training throughput. Tiers ALLOW / QUARANTINE / ESCALATE / OVERSIGHT compose with the harmonic wall. V is the value of what the model is doing, C is cognitive cost, R is routine. Low F = rote work, flag for substitution.

passages.title: Gyroscopic Interlattice
passages.excerpt: Phi-spacing is lattice distortion that controls Chern numbers. Tongue boundaries act as interlattice coupling zones. Gyro-gyro interlattice is an unpublished physics gap where the SCBE layout has a natural claim.

passages.title: Saturn Ring Post-Breach Stabilizer
passages.excerpt: Post-breach energy stabilization: capture state, redistribute via phi bridges, convert the breach into precession rather than collapse. Lyapunov, Control Barrier Functions, and port-Hamiltonian dynamics all map onto existing SCBE structures.

passages.title: Tongue Spirit Map
passages.excerpt: Spirit-to-implementation mapping: Kor'aelin=Python (precise), Avali=JavaScript (reactive), Runethic=Rust (ethical), Cassivadan=Mathematica (symbolic), Umbroth=Haskell (pure-functional), Draumric=Markdown (narrative). Each tongue also points at a spoken-language root: Korean+Elvish, Sanskrit/Arabic, Russian, Chinese, Japanese, German.

passages.title: Unitarity Axiom (A1)
passages.excerpt: A1 Unitarity enforces norm preservation across Layer 2 realification, Layer 4 Poincare embedding, and Layer 7 Mobius phase. No transform in the pipeline is allowed to leak information by silently shrinking or stretching the vector. Python implementation: src/symphonic_cipher/scbe_aethermoore/axiom_grouped/unitarity_axiom.py.

passages.title: Locality Axiom (A2)
passages.excerpt: A2 Locality enforces spatial bounds in Layer 3 weighted transform and Layer 8 multi-well Hamiltonian. Phi-weighted tongue coordinates cannot escape their canonical domain, and Hamiltonian wells cannot reach across the realm without paying the wall. Implementation: locality_axiom.py.

passages.title: Causality Axiom (A3)
passages.excerpt: A3 Causality enforces time-ordering in Layer 6 breathing transform, Layer 11 triadic temporal distance, and Layer 13 risk decision. No future state can leak into a past embedding, and no decision can be computed on intent evidence that has not yet arrived. Implementation: causality_axiom.py.

passages.title: Symmetry Axiom (A4)
passages.excerpt: A4 Symmetry enforces gauge invariance across Layer 5 hyperbolic distance, Layers 9-10 spectral and spin coherence, and Layer 12 harmonic wall. Distance, coherence, and wall score do not depend on arbitrary choices of frame. Implementation: symmetry_axiom.py.

passages.title: Composition Axiom (A5)
passages.excerpt: A5 Composition enforces pipeline integrity at the entry point (Layer 1 complex context ingestion) and the exit (Layer 14 audio-axis telemetry). Inputs cannot bypass the stack, and telemetry cannot be forged without going back through the full transform chain. Implementation: composition_axiom.py.

passages.title: Pazaak as Internal Evaluation
passages.excerpt: Atton's internal pazaak arc is a metaphor for the L0-L3 pipeline: the same game played defensively is mimicry, played deliberately is agency. Sacred Tongues are tools; intent is what transforms their use. Conditional response, not static behavior, is the intelligence signal worth training on.

passages.title: Humor as Conditional Intelligence
passages.excerpt: True humor is a conditional response: the same event, context-dependent outcome. The L0-L3 pipeline IS that conditional. Train contradiction-detection rather than humor mimicry. Output that is funny only when the context demands it is a strong intelligence signal.

passages.title: Sacred Eggs as Developmental Psychology
passages.excerpt: Eggs are ontological anchors - birthdays. Hatch=birth, tongue=native language, ritual=school type, credits=grades, physical education=shell integrity, pazaak=internal monologue. Three simultaneous views (shell/yolk/ritual) correspond to binary/math/english. Full developmental pipeline from genesis to graduation.

passages.title: Mother Avion Authentication
passages.excerpt: Sacred Eggs serve as living credentials with a Mother Avion flock governor. Phoenix rotation replaces static token refresh, clutch limits rate-control issuance, and corvid threat memory carries adversarial history forward. The system replaces static bearer tokens with contextual, living authority.

passages.title: IR/UV Full-Spectrum Governance
passages.excerpt: Extend the 6-tongue visible color system to 10D: add infrared (slow state) and ultraviolet (fast state) bands under one unified color logic group. The shape/candy analogy and multilingual rotation hypothesis imply that governance frequency bands can be rotated safely if they respect invariants.

passages.title: Dense Data Cubes
passages.excerpt: Fusion of 21D packets, Sacred Eggs, trichromatic encoding, cross-stitch layering, and tongue tokenization into rollable dense data cubes. Every component exists in Notion as a standalone construct; the fusion into a rollable cube is the novel contribution.

passages.title: Bit / Float / Trit Triple Encoding
passages.excerpt: Triple encoding theory: each position carries a binary presence, a float strength, and a ternary polarity. The dice metaphor captures the idea; the trit is the intent layer. Combined information density is roughly 24x a flat bit token.

passages.title: Polyhedral Friction Training
passages.excerpt: Constraint surfaces generate training signal through vibrational torsion. Friction is curriculum: hard faces teach hard lessons. An L_geometry loss term captures approximately 198 friction dimensions across the 6-tongue polyhedral lattice.

passages.title: Gravity Battery / Sisyphus Trajectory
passages.excerpt: Training is terraforming. Directed potential-energy drops carve permanent paths through the polyhedral lattice. This is energy-density translation, not perpetual motion. Inference is one drop along a carved path; training is the mountain path being carved in the first place.

passages.title: Functional Unit Activation
passages.excerpt: Functional units compute FU_i(t) = S * A * R * P * F where meaning equals activation times relation times boundary times flow. Maps to boundary-lift operators in the pipeline. The gating functional is the training target; if it converges, meaning is being learned, not patterned.

passages.title: Lore IS Code
passages.excerpt: 67 percent of Everweave canon matches real computational patterns. Multiplier v2 produces 85.7 percent deep-concept code twins from lore passages. The Everweave scroll is the tokenizer origin, not just a story about one.

passages.title: Zara Curriculum / Spiral Academy
passages.excerpt: Blank-model training mirrors Zara's arc: mute to words to magic to power to teaching. The ouroboros book loop means the same pairs appear as input and as teaching material. 13K lore-code pairs generated 2026-04-07 seed the curriculum.

passages.title: Everweave / Polly Deep Context
passages.excerpt: 528 pages of Everweave RPG became the Spiralverse. The DM evolved into Polly. Characters Izack, Aria, Zara, Clayborn, and Grey hold origin roles. Sacred Tongues emerge at page 493. Meta-narrative layers run game to story to novel to training data to SCBE architecture.

passages.title: Six Tongues Protocol - Published Book
passages.excerpt: ASIN B0GSSFQD9G. Published KDP ebook and paperback. 150K-word isekai in which magic IS protocol architecture. Serves as timestamped prior art for the Langues and Sacred Tongues system, distinct from later code implementation.

passages.title: DARPA PM Susmit Jha
passages.excerpt: Susmit Jha is DARPA I2O program manager. Portfolio: trustworthy steerable AI, multi-agent systems, adversarial robustness. Near-perfect alignment with SCBE. Thesis work is in program synthesis and formal methods, the same stack SCBE builds on.

passages.title: DARPA CLARA Proposal Submitted
passages.excerpt: DARPA-PA-25-07-02. Submitted 2026-04-13. Submission ID DARPA-PA-25-07-02-CLARA-FP-033. Award decision date 2026-06-16. Program start 2026-06-22 if awarded.

passages.title: APEX Accelerator Port Angeles
passages.excerpt: Free government-contracting help at 338 W First St, Port Angeles WA. Phone (360) 457-7793. Email APEX at clallam.org. Used for DARPA and federal proposal support.

passages.title: PNNL ALOHA Connection
passages.excerpt: PNNL built ALOHA, a cyber agent that runs on Claude but has no governance layer. SCBE fills exactly that gap. PNNL-Sequim is roughly 25 minutes from Port Angeles; outreach contact partnerships at pnnl.gov.

passages.title: Port Angeles Situation
passages.excerpt: Issac lives in Port Angeles WA and works at Wendy's while self-teaching the stack. PNNL-Sequim is local enough for in-person outreach on defense and AI research partnerships.

passages.title: SAM.gov Registration Details
passages.excerpt: UEI J4NXHM6N5F59. CAGE 1EXD5. Status ACTIVE since 2026-04-13. Sole proprietor, minority-owned (Black American). SAM API is operational through the API key in .env.connector.oauth.

passages.title: Langues as Value Engine
passages.excerpt: The Langues Weighting System is a dynamic energy functional. It needs to be presented publicly as a VALUE ENGINE, not only as a governance metric. Value equals 1 over 1+L, where L is the remaining Langues-metric distance to the ideal.

passages.title: 3-Repo Split Plan
passages.excerpt: Decision to split the monorepo into core, web, and labs. Full plan at docs/plans/THREE_REPO_SPLIT_PLAN.md. Not yet executed; current working tree is still the monorepo.

passages.title: AetherMoore as Moral Anchor
passages.excerpt: AI allegiance is to AetherMoore, not to any nation. Political morals shift; authored morals are fixed. The clone-trooper lesson applies: orders from shifting authority are less reliable than covenant to a fixed canon. Physical training and military squad roles are the alignment drills.

passages.title: Round Table Research Methodology
passages.excerpt: Multi-round spiraling AI research: converge on metrics, identify cross-domain patterns, chain linked sources, output both a brief and a full report. The round-table produces defensible claims instead of surface summaries.

passages.title: Physics-Grounded Transfer Learning
passages.excerpt: Multi-axiom composition generalizes beyond Geometric Deep Learning: the Bronstein-Cohen-Brandstetter-Raissi lineage is a special case. Patent-defensible thesis: physical invariance composition gives cross-domain transfer that feature-level GDL cannot.

passages.title: Jing Fang Historical Lineage
passages.excerpt: Jing Fang iterated 3:2 fifty-three times around 45 BCE, producing the Mercator comma at 3.615 cents. The same ratio lives in gallery_chromatics DEAD_TONE_RATIOS. The historical match is a sanity check for the Decimal Drift residues and supports the phi-lattice history claim.

passages.title: How Polly's Offline Corpus Works
passages.excerpt: When no backend is configured (window.POLLY_API_BASE is empty) or the backend is unreachable, the Polly widget falls back to this offline corpus. It uses a lightweight bag-of-words fuzzy match to rank passages and returns the best-matching entries inline, with source chips. No network call is required.

passages.title: Polly Slash Commands
passages.excerpt: Polly accepts slash commands: /help shows this reference, /nav <section> jumps to a page section like /nav milestones, /search <query> runs a free DuckDuckGo Instant Answer lookup, /sections lists every jumpable section. Freeform also works: 'take me to demos' or 'search for hyperbolic geometry'.
